rationale: The citing paper references Griskevicius et al. (2009) only in grouped literature-review citations, mainly as an example of prior emotion research and prior use of the term "love" to refer to desire-related states. The paper does not engage that study's specific findings, mechanisms, or persuasion-heuristic framework in its hypothesis development. Its theorizing and empirical design are anchored instead in broaden-and-build theory and the authors' own emotion comparisons. There is no clear methodological or conceptual dependence on this specific cited work beyond background positioning.
